metadata.name: Manage a Minor Hydraulic Oil Spill

description: A terminal tractor has a hydraulic line break, causing a small oil spill on the quay. An environmental officer must manage the cleanup.

nodes.task_description: Receive the report of the spill and its location.

expected_outcome.value: Officer is notified of the spill at Berth 5.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the port's spill response team with a spill kit to the location.

expected_outcome.value: The response team is dispatched with absorbent materials.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the spill is contained, cleaned up, and the waste material is disposed of correctly, then log the incident.

expected_outcome.value: The officer confirms cleanup is complete, waste is sent to the hazardous waste facility, and a report is filed.
